name: Ceragon Networks
description: Ceragon Networks Ltd. specializes in providing innovative wireless transport technologies that enhance rural connectivity. Their rural broadband solutions offer high-capacity, low-latency networks that can be deployed quickly, addressing the unique challenges of delivering internet access to underserved areas.

name: Rural Wifi
description: Rural WiFi is dedicated to enhancing connectivity in rural areas of Ireland by offering a wide range of broadband solutions, including Fibre, 5G, Wireless, High-Speed, and Satellite. Their commitment to providing comprehensive and reliable internet access, along with award-winning customer support, makes them a key player in improving rural connectivity.

name: Gigaclear
description: Gigaclear Ltd is dedicated to enhancing rural connectivity by providing ultrafast fibre-to-the-premises (FTTP) broadband solutions to underserved communities across the UK. With the largest exclusively rural FTTP network, Gigaclear aims to bridge the digital divide, already connecting over 300,000 rural homes and businesses and planning to extend this reach significantly by 2024.

name: Ribbon Communications
description: Ribbon Communications provides tailored solutions for regional and rural service providers, addressing the challenges posed by legacy TDM networks. Their comprehensive portfolio includes advanced IP and optical transport capabilities that enable the deployment of broadband and 5G services, helping to modernize networks and enhance business viability in these areas.

name: Country Connect Ltd
description: Country Connect specializes in providing high-speed broadband solutions for rural areas, offering services like full-fibre and ultrafast Internet with speeds up to 900Mbps. Their focus on advanced broadband networks ensures reliable connectivity for residential and commercial properties in remote locations.

name: iSAT Africa Ltd FZC
description: iSAT Africa is dedicated to enhancing rural connectivity across Africa by offering comprehensive end-to-end solutions for Mobile Network Operators (MNOs). Their innovative Rural GSM solution addresses challenges like unreliable power and high costs, enabling MNOs to extend their reach into underserved areas efficiently and sustainably.

name: Blue Wireless
description: Blue Wireless specializes in providing managed wireless WAN solutions, offering reliable LTE and 5G connectivity for rural and remote locations. Their expertise in deploying advanced antenna technologies ensures that even sites far from cell towers can maintain high-speed internet, making it ideal for various applications such as mining, energy farms, and temporary branches.

name: Virgin Media
description: Virgin Media has significantly enhanced rural connectivity in the Test & Dun Valley by providing ultrafast broadband speeds of 516Mbps to 4,000 homes and businesses, transforming the online experience for residents who previously endured very slow connections. This initiative, driven by community advocacy, not only facilitates remote work, streaming, and online activities but also sets the stage for future expansions of high-speed internet access in other rural areas.

name: Ruralweb Telecom
description: Ruralweb Telecomunicações Ltda. specializes in satellite solutions, providing broadband internet access across all of Brazil, making it a key player in enhancing rural connectivity. With over 20 years of experience, the company offers customized plans and high availability services, ensuring that clients in remote areas can access reliable internet.

name: Reliance Communications
description: Reliance Communications Limited offers a robust digital network infrastructure that enhances connectivity, including solutions like CLOUD X WAN, which provides managed SD-WAN services with hybrid underlay options. This capability allows for flexible and cost-effective connectivity, making it particularly relevant for improving rural connectivity through its extensive global reach and integration of low-cost Internet options.
